name: Boulden Buses Inc
principals: Kenneth (Kenny) Darsney (President/Owner); Christopher Darsney and Michelle Dougherty (officers)
districts_or_customers: New Castle County, DE area schools; appears as vendor in State of Delaware open expenditures (incl. New Castle County Vo-Tech)
recent_news: Active independent operator per FMCSA SAFER (USDOT 6727); MCS-150 updated April 2026; conditional safety rating (older, 2010) with no recent crashes or serious violations.
fit_notes: Very small DE operator (~9 buses); 90+ years family-run gives succession/tuck-in angle in a Summit expansion state, but scale is sub-scale even for a tuck-in.

name: Turkeyfoot Transport Inc
owner_or_parent: unknown (David Suder listed as owner in source data; possibly inactive — Mlaker Transportation/Mlaker LLC is current Turkeyfoot Valley Area SD contractor at neighboring 921 Casselman St)
principals: David Suder (listed owner per source data; not confirmed online)
districts_or_customers: Historically Turkeyfoot Valley Area School District area (Confluence/Somerset County, PA); current TVASD contractor is Mlaker, LLC (Craig & Matt Mlaker), not Turkeyfoot Transport Inc
recent_news: USDOT 1005395 'Turkeyfoot Transportation Inc' at 921 Casselman St shows as 1-truck general freight carrier — likely a different entity or wind-down. Mlaker Transportation (Davidsville-based, multi-generational family operator transporting 8,500+ students daily) now serves Turkeyfoot Valley Area SD.
fit_notes: Likely defunct/non-operating school bus entity — the local TVASD route is now served by Mlaker (a multi-generational family operator that itself could be a real tuck-in target). Skip Turkeyfoot Transport; redirect interest to Mlaker.

name: Bay Terrace Transit Corp
districts_or_customers: Long Island / NYC metro area; listed in NYSDOT Bus Operator Profiles 2021-2022 (operating ~11 buses out of Port Washington base per NYSDOT register, though source data lists New Hyde Park HQ)
recent_news: Appears in NYSDOT Bus Operator Profiles (Apr 2021 - Mar 2022); no recent M&A or news identified.
fit_notes: Very small NY operator (~11 buses). Plausible independent tuck-in in dense LI/NYC market where consolidators (Beacon Mobility, NYCSBUS, Consolidated) are active; would need direct outreach to confirm ownership and succession.

name: Blue Boy Bus Trnsprtn Co Inc
districts_or_customers: Lower Manhattan / Chinatown area (42 E Broadway address); likely NYC DOE school-age contract carrier historically — not confirmed on current NYC DOE contractor list
recent_news: No public M&A or news identified. The 'Blue Boy LLC' (USDOT 3208598) found on FMCSA is a Hialeah FL general-freight carrier — NOT this entity, so DOT registration/operating status of Blue Boy Bus Transportation Co Inc is unverified online.
fit_notes: Possibly very small Chinatown-area NYC school bus operator; minimal online footprint suggests it may be inactive, micro-scale, or operating informally. NYC market is consolidating (Beacon Mobility / NYCSBUS); only worth pursuing if confirmed active with DOE contracts. Low priority.

name: Workingmans Bus Svc Inc
districts_or_customers: Oil City / Venango County, PA area (historically Oil City Area School District region presumed)
recent_news: No public website, phone unavailable in source data, and no recent online footprint — listed address is the historic National Transit Building (an arts/cultural center, not a bus depot), suggesting the entity may be defunct, dormant, or only a mailing address.
fit_notes: Likely inactive or shell entity — address is a historic arts hub, no operating presence confirmed. De-prioritize; verify status via PA DOS corporate registry / PennDOT school bus contractor list before any outreach.
